name: Citrus Grain Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Cooked grains (such as brown rice, barley, or kamut)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate 1 tablespoon of orange zest using gentle pressure, removing only the colored part.
2. Set aside.
3. Peel the oranges and separate into sections.
4. Set aside about 8 sections for garnish and coarsely chop the remainder.
5. In a large bowl, combine cooked grains, orange zest, chopped oranges, parsley, carrots, celery, and raisins.
6. For the dressing, in a food processor or jar, combine olive oil, vinegar, lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Pulse briefly or shake well to blend.
7. Pour the dressing over the grain mixture and toss until thoroughly blended.
8. Taste and add more salt or lemon juice if needed to enhance flavors.
9. Serve on a bed of lettuce leaves and garnish with reserved orange sections.
